hero.title: Your Professional Partner in Outdoor Advertising
hero.subtitle: We connect your brand with millions at the most strategic locations in the city. Media planning, space rental, and campaign management — all in one place.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: We offer the most effective outdoor advertising solutions for your brand across all formats and locations.

marquee.title: Where Your Brand Will Be Seen
marquee.description: From billboards to LED screens, bridge panels to vehicle wraps — your brand across the entire city.

gallery.title: Advertising Formats
gallery.description: High-visibility outdoor media in the format that best suits your brand.

whyUs.title: Why ThaB Media?
whyUs.subtitle: We manage media selection, planning, and execution for outdoor advertising from a single point of contact.

items.title: Strategic Media Planning
items.description: Every campaign is unique. We analyze your brand's target audience, industry, budget range, and campaign objectives in detail to create the media combination that delivers the highest return. We make data-driven decisions while considering competitor analysis and market dynamics.

items.title: Visibility-Focused Location Selection
items.description: Location selection directly impacts your campaign's success. We evaluate criteria such as pedestrian and vehicle traffic density, visibility angles, environmental obstructions, and target audience profiles to identify the most impactful spots for your brand.

items.title: Single-Point Process Management
items.description: From media research to proposal preparation, from creative compliance checks to installation tracking — we manage the entire process from a single point of contact. While you focus on your business, we monitor every stage of your campaign and provide regular progress reports.

items.title: Digital and Traditional OOH Solutions
items.description: We offer everything from traditional formats like billboards, bus shelters, lightboxes, and bus wraps to digital solutions like LED screens and DOOH — all under one roof. We determine the optimal format mix for your campaign, ensuring maximum impact through an integrated strategy.

locations.title: Our Advertising Locations
locations.description: Outdoor advertising spaces at the most strategic points across Turkey.

steps.title: Understand Your Needs
steps.description: We evaluate your brand's goals, budget, and target audience together.

steps.title: Create the Right Media Plan
steps.description: We prepare format, location, and timing recommendations for you.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: After approval, we quickly bring your campaign to life.

references.title: Trusted by Leading Brands
references.subtitle: Industry-leading brands trust us for their outdoor advertising.

blog.title: Outdoor Advertising Guide
blog.description: Key topics to know when choosing the right media for your brand.

posts.oohExcerpt: Outdoor advertising is a powerful visibility channel that connects brands with their audiences in the physical world through billboards, bus stops, digital screens, lightboxes, and urban media spaces.
posts.billboardTitle: What Does Billboard Advertising Offer Brands?
posts.billboardExcerpt: Billboard advertising increases brand awareness by providing continuous visibility in high-traffic areas. With the right location, your campaign message reaches wide audiences repeatedly throughout the day.
posts.doohTitle: Why is DOOH and Digital Screen Advertising Important?
posts.doohExcerpt: Digital outdoor advertising offers a more dynamic alternative to traditional OOH media through motion content, time-based scheduling, and attention-grabbing screen usage.
posts.selectionTitle: How to Choose the Right Advertising Space?
posts.selectionExcerpt: For an effective outdoor campaign, not just the media type but also location, target audience, traffic density, visibility angle, and campaign duration must be evaluated together.

adPreview.title: See Your Ad Before It Goes Live
adPreview.description: Preview your logo or creative on different outdoor media formats instantly.

items.question: How does the outdoor ad space rental process work?
items.answer: We determine the right location and format together, prepare a proposal, and launch your campaign after approval.

items.question: What advertising formats do you offer?
items.answer: We offer a wide range including billboards, digital screens (DOOH), metro ads, bus stop panels, lightboxes, and pole banners.

items.question: What is the minimum rental period?
items.answer: While it varies by format and location, we typically work in minimum 1-week periods.

items.question: How can I get a quote?
items.answer: You can fill out the form on our contact page or email us directly. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

faq.answer: Giantboards are larger formats than standard billboards, typically placed on highways or high-traffic arterial routes.

faq.question: What is bus superback?
faq.answer: A large-format advertising space on the rear panel of buses. Easily visible to following vehicle traffic.

faq.question: What's the difference between superback and full wrap?
faq.answer: Superback covers only the rear panel of the bus, while full wrap uses the entire exterior surface. Superback is more cost-effective.

blogArticles.ctaTitle: Let's choose the right media for your brand together

body: Outdoor advertising (OOH - Out of Home) encompasses all advertising media that allow brands to reach their target audiences outside of enclosed spaces, in the physical world. Billboards, bus shelters, digital screens, lightboxes, bus wraps, and many other formats fall within this scope.

In an era where digital advertising is growing rapidly, the importance of outdoor media is increasing rather than diminishing. The fundamental reason is that consumer interaction with physical spaces in their daily lives is unavoidable. People constantly encounter outdoor media while commuting, shopping, or engaging in social activities.

One of the strongest aspects of outdoor advertising is that it cannot be blocked. In the digital environment, an ad blocker can be used or an ad can be skipped; however, it is much harder to ignore a billboard or bus shelter panel in the city.

Modern outdoor advertising is not limited to traditional static panels. Thanks to digital screens, dynamic content, time-based campaigns, and programmatic buying models have also entered this space. These developments make outdoor advertising a more measurable and flexible channel.

The key advantages of outdoor media include: broad and repeated audience reach, high visibility, rapid brand awareness building capacity, location-based targeting capability, and 24/7 uninterrupted communication.
With proper media planning, outdoor advertising plays a critical role in brands' media strategies as a channel that complements and strengthens digital campaigns.

Billboard advertising is one of the most well-known and effective formats of outdoor advertising. Positioned at the busiest intersections, highway sides, and high-traffic areas of cities, billboards offer brands a unique visibility advantage.

The most important benefit billboards provide to brands is continuous and repeated visibility. A digital ad is displayed for a few seconds and passes; however, a billboard reaches its target audience with the same message, in the same location, every day throughout the campaign period. This repetition strengthens brand awareness.

Location selection is the determining factor in billboard campaign success. A billboard in the right location can reach tens of thousands of people daily. Traffic density, visibility angle, environmental factors, and target audience profile are elements that must be evaluated in location decisions.
Billboard advertising is particularly effective for: new product or service launches, brand awareness campaigns, event announcements, increasing retail traffic, and corporate image building.

With the proliferation of digital billboards, dynamic content and time-based broadcasting capabilities have been added to traditional billboard advantages. Dynamic campaigns such as showing different messages during day and night, or changing creatives based on weather conditions have become possible.
For an effective billboard campaign, a clear and short message, strong visuals, readable typography, and strategic location selection must be considered together.

DOOH (Digital Out of Home) is an outdoor advertising model delivered through digital screens. Compared to traditional static panels, it offers advantages such as dynamic content display, flexible scheduling, and programmatic buying.

The rise of digital screen advertising is directly proportional to technological development. The decreasing cost of LED screens, strengthening software infrastructure, and widespread internet connectivity have made DOOH a more accessible and measurable channel.

The main advantages of DOOH over traditional OOH include: dynamic and attention-grabbing content display, day/time-based flexible broadcast planning, ability for multiple advertisers to share the same screen, instant campaign changes, and performance data collection.
Programmatic DOOH enables digital screen spaces to be managed through automated buying platforms. This allows optimized campaigns based on audience data, location data, and time periods.

Digital screens are positioned at high-traffic points such as shopping malls, metro stations, airports, roadsides, and public transportation vehicles. Each location has a different audience profile and interaction duration.

Key points brands should consider when developing a DOOH strategy: the daily routes of their target audience, creative design suited to screen size and position, content length compatible with message reading time, and broadcast planning aligned with campaign objectives.

The first and most critical step in running an effective outdoor advertising campaign is choosing the right advertising space. Beyond the media type, location, target audience, traffic density, and campaign objectives all shape this decision.

The fundamental criteria to evaluate in advertising space selection include: daily pedestrian and vehicle traffic, visibility angle and distance, competitive situation in the surroundings, alignment of target audience profile with the location, and budget-impact balance.

Each outdoor format serves a different communication purpose. Billboards are ideal for reaching wide audiences; bus shelter and stop ads provide close communication with pedestrian traffic; digital screens are suitable for dynamic messages; lightbox panels offer night visibility advantages.

Common mistakes in location selection include focusing only on price, not evaluating the visibility angle, ignoring environmental obstacles (trees, buildings, other signs), and not checking the alignment between target audience and location.

Professional media planning support provides a significant advantage in choosing the right space. Through traffic data, demographic analysis, and accumulated experience, the goal is to use the campaign budget most efficiently.
In conclusion, choosing the right advertising space is a strategic process that seeks answers not just to 'where' but to 'who', 'when', 'in what format', and 'with what message' together.

formatDescriptions.billboard: Roadside large format advertising panel. Provides 24/7 visibility in high-traffic areas.
formatDescriptions.busStop: Vertical poster panel at bus stop shelters. Reaches pedestrians and transit passengers.
formatDescriptions.digitalScreen: LED digital display. Ideal for motion content and dynamic campaigns.
formatDescriptions.busBack: Bus rear panel advertising. Moving visibility throughout city traffic.
formatDescriptions.poleBanner: Vertical banner mounted on street light poles. High visibility on main roads.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information about the protection of your personal data

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
sections.content: As ThaB Media, we process your personal data as data controller within the scope of the applicable data protection regulations for the purposes explained below.

sections.heading: 2. Personal Data Collected
sections.content: Through the contact form on our website, your name, email address, phone number, company name, and message content are collected. Additionally, anonymous visit statistics may be collected through cookies.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
sections.content: Personal data collected is processed for the purposes of responding to your quote requests, providing information about our services, fulfilling communication requests, and meeting legal obligations.

sections.heading: 4. Data Sharing
sections.content: Your personal data is not shared with third parties except as required by law. Data submitted through the contact form is transmitted to us via the Web3Forms infrastructure.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention Period
sections.content: Your personal data is retained for the duration required by the processing purposes and within the framework of legal obligations.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the right to know whether your personal data is being processed, to request information if it has been processed, to learn the purpose of processing, to know the third parties to whom it is transferred, to request correction if incomplete or inaccurate, and to request deletion or destruction.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.content: You can submit your requests regarding your personal data to info@thabmedia.com.tr.
